title: Solar KB default retrieval + Obsidian seamless sync
evidence: Solar active hooks read ~/.solar/solar.db, but mostly inject startup snippets, reminders, or async capture rather than default sourced retrieval.
memory-influence.sh needs schema and SQL precedence fixes for evo_memory_semantic.
knowledge-sync.ts has Obsidian support but does not point to /Users/lisihao/Knowledge and no sync daemon is active.
Obsidian bridge can export Solar DB rows to _raw/solar-db-export, but vault content is not indexed into Solar FTS by default.

history.note: Created P0 reliability contract to make Solar KB default retrieval real and connect Obsidian vault to Solar search/indexing.
handoff_to=planner; planner must split into retrieval, sync, and status/test slices and dispatch at least two builders when available.
Created PRD and moved sprint to drafting/prd_ready so coordinator can dispatch planner through the standard PM→Planner flow.
Patched chain-watcher to stop promoting drafting sprints without plan.md; kept this sprint at drafting/prd_ready for planner.

design.md (15KB / 261 行) + plan.md (14.7KB / 261 行) 落地: 3 切片 (S1 retrieval+memory-fix / S2 vault-index+export / S3 status+tests+docs), S1+S2 并行 派两 builder, S3 串行依赖前两者; A1-A7 验收命令落到 plan §4; no-live-pane 保护落到 plan §5; rollback/stop rules 落到 plan §6. status drafting/contract_ready -> active, phase -> planning_complete, handoff -> builder_main.
Coordinator planning_complete path dispatched only main builder; created scoped builder1/builder2 dispatch files and set parallel_expected_handoffs=2.

history.reason: A2 vault_hits returns source obsidian literal + relative path lacking Knowledge string; A5 keys added to wrong file wiki-capture-server.py port 8788 instead of harness symphony/status-server.py at port 8765. A1/A3/A4/A6 live PASS; A7 10/10 PASS but tmp-only does not catch live failures.
A1-A7 7/7 PASS live; Round 2 root causes (A2 source/path absolute + multi-token split; A5 correct lib/symphony/status-server.py port 8765) confirmed fixed; 10/10 tests; 4 falsifications graceful
